marshallese.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: ej ijo elōñ armej rej jino — addiin peiṃ rej pād ioon a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
marshallese.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: button eo. Dyslexia font, audio cues, high-contrast, large-key keyboard, im bar jet — er make rej kein jerbal, jab juon oktak.
marshallese.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Ejjeḷọk timer, ejjeḷọk iāekwōj, ejjeḷọk kaje streak. Etal ilo aṃ mōkajkaj. Kakkije jabdewōt iien.
marshallese.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: drill — AI ej je juon text in katak ilo grade level eo aṃ kōn jabdewōt eo kwōj itoklimo kake. Kōjjarōk
marshallese.and_it_will_illustrate_what_you_type: im enaaj pijaik ta eo kwōj taip.
marshallese.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: emaroñ oktak — laajrak in kōḷar swatch ko ilōñ rej oktak ñan 5 visual theme. Ak jibwe
marshallese.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Juon clinician ak ri-kaki emaroñ likūt juon IEP goal im export wōnṃaanḷọk jān
marshallese.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Raan calendar ko rej make iaer im ewōr ilo joñan juon session ilo 30 raan ko rej mootḷọk. Ejjeḷọk kaje ñan raan in kakkije.
marshallese.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Taip ak likūt text eo. Leta ko rej make, nōṃba, im mark ko rej make rej jerbal eṃṃan.
marshallese.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — session in jāmin kōjparok. Ejjeḷọk pressure, ejjeḷọk record.
marshallese.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Ak jibwe Space ak Enter ñan jino. Jibwe Esc jabdewōt iien ilo drill ñan diwōjḷọk.
marshallese.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Passage ko rej jab Pālle rej kōjerbal ASCII wōt (ejjeḷọk accent / tilde) bwe key ko ioon keyboard eo emaroñ pād wōt target in katak.
marshallese.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: e.g. space, kidu, Minecraft, lọjet, iien piọ in Maine
marshallese.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Passage set ko eṃōj jeje kōn pā im rej jerbal ilo ejjeḷọk AI. Passage ko eṃōj bōktok rej koba ñan library eo aṃ eṃōj kōjparoke; ejja passage in wiik ñan wiik ej juon baseline eṃṃanḷọk ñan IEP trend jān text eṃōj bar kōṃṃane.
marshallese.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Passage ko eṃōj kōṃṃani ejja kein. Drill jabdewōt ñan kōjerbal bar juon alen. Eo etto tata ej wōtlọk ñe kwōj kōṃṃan eo kein ka 9.
marshallese.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Ejjeḷọk text eṃōj load ñan drill in.
marshallese.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Kajjojo bar = char ko eṃōj taip ilo 10-second window. Hover ñan lo WPM eo aer.
marshallese.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Uwaak eo aṃ ej jipañ ri-kaki ro ñan lo ñe nōṃba ko rej jab ba aolepān bwebwenato eo.
marshallese.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Ewi wāween session in? "Iar jino ruṃwij, iar peran wōt, iar kōjerbal slow-motion mode..."
marshallese.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Note eo eṃōj kōjparoke ippān session in. Enaaj waḷọk ilo IEP report im CSV export.
marshallese.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Kōṃṃanṃanḷọk pija eo āliktata kōn image-to-image jān jino jān jino
marshallese.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Download pija in āinwōt juon PNG file
marshallese.recent_tap_to_restore: Ejja kein · jibwe ñan bar bōktok
marshallese.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Bar kajjioñ ejja text eo ñan anjọ ioon score eo aṃ
marshallese.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Ej kwaḷọk aolepān passage eo iumwin joñan in second ṃokta jān an jino taip. Ej jipañ ri-jikuuḷ ro rej bōk tokjān riit ṃokta, innem kōṃṃan. Ri-jikuuḷ eo emaroñ kajjeoñ count-in jabdewōt iien.
marshallese.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Ālkin joñan in minute in taip eṃakit (iien bōjrak jab bwini), kwaḷọk juon kakememej ineeṃṃan ñan kakkije. Ej waḷọk juon alen ilo kajjojo drill. Ej kune jān jino.
marshallese.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Ukoktak aolepān wāween in kein jerbal. High-contrast mode ej anjọ ioon theme ko. Kawaii ej juon theme meram; ko jet rej dark variant.
marshallese.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Ukoktak kōḷar in highlight eo eṃōj kōjerbale ñan char eo kiiō, button ko, im mark swatch ko. Ri-jikuuḷ ro rej lo blue āinwōt ḷap an piọ ak rej kōṇaan kōḷar māāṇāṇ ñan focus. High-contrast mode ej anjọ ioon menin.
marshallese.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Kāālet text in drill kadu ak aetok. "Kadu" ej jipañ ri-jikuuḷ ro ewōr aer apañ in focus ak ṃōk; "Aetok" ñan ri-jikuuḷ ro rej ejaak endurance. Ñe drill eo ejjeḷọk sample ekkar ñan kāālet eo, ej kōjerbal jabdewōt.
marshallese.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Juon dot ineeṃṃan ej pulsing ioon drill screen ej kaalikkar juon rhythm ekajjot. EJJEḶỌK kaje ñe kwōj etal ruṃwij — ej juon reference, jab juon iien limit. Tokjān ñan motor-planning. Ej kune jān jino.
marshallese.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Eñin space eo aṃ. Etke kwōj katak? Ta target eo aṃ rainin? Ājḷọk jān IEP goal eo an clinician.
marshallese.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: e.g. "Taip ej pen kiiō, ak inaaj maroñ je bwebwenato ko aō." · "Ikōṇaan jilkinḷọk email ñan jibū im ejjeḷọk jipañ jān jinō." · "Taip mōkaj = iien homework edikḷọk."
marshallese.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Mejānkajjik rainin ej aṃ — jab bwini ṇae eok ñe kwōj jab tōpare. Ej make reset ilju.
marshallese.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Likūt juon IEP-style goal ijin. Ej waḷọk ioon drill screen im ej make kobrak progress report. Aikuj wōt ñe kwōj kōṃṃan progress notes ko rejejjet.
marshallese.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Kōjerbal initials ak juon āt riab — AlloFlow eṃōj design ñan FERPA-safe.
marshallese.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: e.g. Ej kāālet home-row kōn large-key keyboard; kadikḷọk bōd ṃokta jān kaḷapḷọk mōkaj.
marshallese.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Kōjparok accommodations + IEP goal + audio theme āinwōt JSON, ak import juon profile jān bar juon kein jerbal. EJJAB copyī session history — men in ej pād ippān kajjojo ri-jikuuḷ.
marshallese.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Full backup ej koba sessions, personal best, mastery, error heatmap, im library ko ruo — aolepān record eo an ri-jikuuḷ. Kōjerbal ṃokta jān aṃ jeorḷọk browser data ak oktak kein jerbal.
marshallese.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Iaḷ in eddek eo aṃ make. Ejjeḷọk peer comparison — kwe wōt, iumwin iien.
marshallese.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Ej jelet trend, report, CSV. Skill tree ej all-time.
marshallese.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Kobaik ak ukoktak juon note. Ej kōjparok ilo blur ak Ctrl+Enter.
marshallese.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Māroro Δ = eṃṃanḷọk · būrōrō = regression · grey = ejjeḷọk ekajet (iien, oran accommodations).
marshallese.practice_calendar_last_30_days: Practice calendar · 30 raan ko rej mootḷọk
marshallese.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Error key ko eḷaptata ilo drill · all-time
marshallese.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drill ko rej oktak rej kwaḷọk mōjṇọ ko rej oktak. Kōjerbal menin ñan kāālet drill ko rej target key ko rej pen.
marshallese.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Menin rej kōṃṃejāje kajjioñ accommodations — jab ṇooje. Kōjerbal ta eo ej jipañ ej kajoor, jab mōjṇọ.
marshallese.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Average WPM ilo kajjojo accommodation ej jerbal vs kune. Ej koba iumwin drill type ko — koba drill ko emaroñ bōd, kōn menin kōjerbal per-drill breakdown ilo report ilaḷ ñan pepe ko relap.
marshallese.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Jibwe report eo ñan kāālet aolep, ak kōjerbal button ko ilaḷ.
marshallese.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Copy juon 2-4 sentence plain-language summary ñan email ñan ri-utiej ro
marshallese.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Kadedeḷọk drill eo aṃ ṃokta ñan lo baseline, trend, im IEP report eo aṃ ijin.
marshallese.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Ejjeḷọk session ekkar ñan filter eo kiiō.
marshallese.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: Ṃakūtkūt ikōtaan drill card ko im nav button ko
marshallese.activate_the_focused_drill_card: Kōjjarōk drill card eo eṃōj focusi
marshallese.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Bar kōṃṃan drill eo aṃ āliktata (fast jump)
marshallese.on_any_screen_with_a_form: Ioon jabdewōt screen ewōr juon form
marshallese.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Aolep men ilo Typing Practice emaroñ tōprak kōn keyboard — men in ej design ñan ri-kōjerbal screen-reader im motor-planning accommodations.
marshallese.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Accommodation toggle ko ioon drill-intro screen remaroñ tōprak wōt kōn keyboard ilo Tab — ejjeḷọk aikuj in drag ñan jabdewōt ṃōttan kein jerbal in.
marshallese.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Optional game mode. Naan ko rej wanlōñḷọk jān ilaḷ; taip naan eo ilōñtata ñan karreoiki. Ñe stack eo ej tōpar tulōñ, kukure eo ej jeṃḷọk. Ejjeḷọk leaderboard, ejjeḷọk streak guilt — personal best wōt.
marshallese.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Kajjojo theme ewōr juon mascot ej waḷọk ilo playfield, menu, im summary screen. Rej react ñan ta eo kwōj kōṃṃane — combo, uwōta, tariṇae, kiki, anjọ, luuj.
marshallese.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Kāālet juon attack word ñan jilkinḷọk ñan bot eo
marshallese.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ ATTACK READY — kāālet juon naan ñan jilkinḷọk
marshallese.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Jibwe juon card AK jibwe 1 / 2 / 3 ñan jilkinḷọk. Jibwe Esc ñan kajjeoñ im jab jilkinḷọk. Stack eo aṃ ej frozen ilo aṃ kāālet.
marshallese.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Bōjrak — stack ko ruo rej frozen. Jibwe Resume ak Esc ñan wōnṃaanḷọk.
marshallese.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Ejaak foundation. Ruṃwij + jiṃwe ej anjọ ioon mōkaj + bōd.
marshallese.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Speed + accuracy ilo productive band. Katak pen.
marshallese.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM eḷap eṃōj tōpare. Tokjān mōkaj ej dikḷọk.
marshallese.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Speed ej eḷḷā jān accuracy budget. Rọọl ñan juon target ruṃwij.
marshallese.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Ḷalem slider rej tune practice target eo aṃ. Widget eo ej kalikkar zone eo aṃ ilo juon iaan 5 discrete state im ej pijaik WPM-accuracy Pareto frontier. Ejjeḷọk score ilo tune — pukot eo ej pād ilo lo practice point ko rejjot.
marshallese.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = accuracy eṃṃantata emaroñ tōpar ilo kajjojo WPM. Lōñ = jab maroñ; ilaḷ = jikin eddek.
marshallese.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Hypothesis (free text): Ta target eo aṃ ekajjot? Ewi wāween accuracy floor ej ukot effective WPM?
marshallese.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Kwōj jaḷ — kwaḷọk prompt ko rōpeḷḷọk
marshallese.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Likūt WPM=80, accuracy=98. Realistic? Keidi ñan zone marker eo aṃ.
marshallese.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Kadikḷọk accuracy floor ñan 80%. Effective WPM ej wanlōñḷọk ke?
marshallese.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Pros rej kōjparok 95%+ ilo 70+ WPM. Etale iaḷ in katak ko rej tōpar ijeṇ.
marshallese.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Juon target ruṃwij kōn accuracy eḷap emaroñ kōṃṃan text eḷapḷọk ilo kajjojo session. Teej e.
marshallese.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Imeḷeḷe tradeoff — kōmeḷeḷeik ilo naan ko aṃ make
marshallese.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Kōmeḷeḷeik ilo naan ko aṃ make: ewi wāween WPM, accuracy, im momentum rej kōṃṃao? Ta Pareto frontier ñan typing practice?
marshallese.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Design note: discrete 5-zone marker; Pareto curve ej kwaḷọk tradeoff space; ejjeḷọk juon target "jejjet" — kōn design.
